summary: Excellent soundboard capture of the 1980 Warfield acoustic first set from the famed three‑set run.
review: The reviewer praises this recording as a nice soundboard source, delivering clear and balanced audio. The show itself is highlighted as part of the historic 1980 three‑set Warfield concerts with an acoustic opening set that even contributed tracks to the Dead Set LP, making it a must‑listen for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Both performance and recording receive high praise (5‑star review), but only one review limits confidence level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the soundboard as 'nice', indicating clear, well‑balanced audio with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic first set typical of Warfield three‑set shows; praised for its historic significance and inclusion of tracks later issued on the Dead Set LP.
